key_facts: China's #1 residential rooftop solar installer by cumulative users
Filed for SSE main-board IPO in 2023 at CNY 36–60B valuation
Spun out of Chint Group in 2015 to capture rural household solar wave
Founded as Chint Anneng Digital Power (Zhejiang) Co., Ltd.
Operates as downstream brand distinct from Chint Power Systems (inverter OEM)

funding_history.notes: IPO at CNY 36–60B valuation range; most-watched downstream listing in China at the time

business_model_notes: Residential rooftop solar EPC and digital energy platform spun from Chint Group. Leverages Chint's manufacturing supply chain (modules, inverters, monitoring hardware) to offer vertically integrated household solar. Revenue model: upfront EPC sale + recurring O&M subscription + digital energy management.
competitive_position: Market leader in residential installation segment by cumulative user count. Main rivals: Skyworth Solar (300x revenue growth, consumer brand approach), Trinapower Richome (#2 by users), Sungrow New Energy.
research_notes: High confidence. Multiple sources corroborate IPO filing (EqualOcean, Dealroom, company website). Revenue figure from equalocean 2023-09-20 article. IPO valuation range from public SSE filing documents.
